local old_load = load
_G.load = function(code, name, mode, env)
    local f = io.open("decrypted_logic.lua", "a")
    f:write("-- Captured Segment --\n" .. tostring(code) .. "\n\n")
    f:close()
    print("已截获一段解密后的核心代码，已保存至文件。")
    return old_load(code, name, mode, env)
end
